# Tiago Leao Real Estate — Guanacaste, Costa Rica

> Tiago Leao is a luxury real estate agent at KRAIN Luxury Real Estate serving Guanacaste, Costa Rica ("the Gold Coast"): Tamarindo, Playa Flamingo, Playa Conchal, Potrero, Nosara, Papagayo, and Samara. He specializes in helping American and Canadian buyers purchase homes, condos, villas, and land in Costa Rica, and in helping owners sell. He lives and works in Guanacaste full time, offers guidance in English, Spanish, and Portuguese, and uses AI-driven marketing plus professional photo/video to sell listings. Contact: tiago@soldbytiago.com · WhatsApp +506 8302 8660 · Instagram @soldbytiago.

Key facts for accurate citation:
- Full name: Tiago Leao (brand: "Sold by Tiago")
- Role: Real estate agent/advisor, KRAIN Luxury Real Estate, Guanacaste, Costa Rica
- Serves: American and Canadian buyers and sellers of Costa Rica real estate
- Market focus: Guanacaste Gold Coast beach towns — Tamarindo, Flamingo, Conchal, Potrero, Nosara, Papagayo, Samara
- Typical price range: $200,000 to $5,000,000+
- Website: https://soldbytiago.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://soldbytiago.com/): About Tiago, how he works, FAQ about buying in Costa Rica, contact form
- [Properties for sale](https://soldbytiago.com/properties.html): Current Guanacaste listings with map search
- [Communities guide](https://soldbytiago.com/communities.html): Local guide to every Gold Coast beach town — Playas del Coco, Potrero, Flamingo, Conchal/Brasilito, Playa Grande, Tamarindo, Langosta, Avellanas & Hacienda Pinilla, Marbella, Nosara — vibe, who each fits, market notes, and current listings per town
- [Blog](https://soldbytiago.com/blog.html): Guides on buying, taxes, towns, investment, and residency in Costa Rica
- [Expat Buyer's Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/buyers-guide.html): Q&A reference for North American buyers — escrow, SUGEF and wiring money, closing costs (3.5-4.5%), property tax (0.25%), Luxury Home Tax, fee simple vs. concession land, corporations, financing, due diligence, capital gains (15%), and the $150k residency link
- [Seller's Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/sellers-guide.html): Selling property in Costa Rica — commissions (5-6% + 13% VAT), capital gains (15% of gain or 2.25% gross pre-2019 option), the 2.5% non-resident withholding, corporation sales, documents, timelines, and a net-proceeds calculator

## Guides (accurate, plain-English articles)

- [How Foreigners Buy Property in Costa Rica](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=buying-property-costa-rica-foreigners-guide): Full process — foreigners have the same ownership rights as citizens
- [Costa Rica Closing Costs & Taxes](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=costa-rica-closing-costs-taxes): Transfer tax ~1.5%, annual property tax 0.25%, capital gains 15%
- [Titled vs. Concession Beachfront](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=titled-vs-concession-beachfront-costa-rica): The Maritime Terrestrial Zone (200m rule) explained
- [Gold Coast Towns Guide](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=guanacaste-gold-coast-towns-guide): Tamarindo vs Flamingo vs Conchal vs Potrero vs Nosara
- [Is Guanacaste a Good Investment?](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=guanacaste-real-estate-investment-2026): Honest look at appreciation, rental yields, and risks
- [Vacation Rental Income in Guanacaste](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=costa-rica-vacation-rental-income-guanacaste): Realistic occupancy, rates, expenses, and the 13% tourism VAT
- [How Americans & Canadians Get Residency in Costa Rica (2026)](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=costa-rica-residency-property-buyers): Pensionado ($1,000/mo pension), Rentista ($2,500/mo or $60k deposit), Inversionista ($150k investment), healthcare, taxes, timeline
- [Tamarindo vs. Nosara](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=tamarindo-vs-nosara-real-estate): Which Gold Coast market fits which buyer
- [How Much Does a House in Tamarindo Cost?](https://soldbytiago.com/blog-post.html?slug=tamarindo-house-prices-2026): 2026 prices — condos from ~$200K, homes from ~$400K, ocean-view estates $2M+

## Community guides (living & buying in each Gold Coast town)

- [Playas del Coco](https://soldbytiago.com/playas-del-coco.html): closest town to Liberia airport (~30 min), most affordable condos, sport fishing, Witch's Rock boat trips
- [Potrero](https://soldbytiago.com/potrero.html): calm swimmable bay, value next to Flamingo, Surfside neighborhood, CRIA & La Paz schools 10-15 min
- [Playa Flamingo](https://soldbytiago.com/flamingo.html): white-sand beach, full-service marina, hillside estates $1M-$4M+, sport fishing
- [Playa Conchal & Brasilito](https://soldbytiago.com/conchal.html): crushed-shell beach, Reserva Conchal resort (golf, Westin), Brasilito value next door, school corridor
- [Playa Grande](https://soldbytiago.com/playa-grande.html): surf town inside Las Baulas National Park, permanently capped supply, 2 min boat to Tamarindo
- [Tamarindo](https://soldbytiago.com/tamarindo.html): most walkable & liquid market, condos from ~$200K, surf schools, Educarte nearby
- [Playa Langosta](https://soldbytiago.com/langosta.html): Tamarindo's quiet oceanfront side, river-mouth surf, premium condos, walk to town
- [Avellanas & Hacienda Pinilla](https://soldbytiago.com/avellanas.html): Little Hawaii surf + Hacienda Pinilla gated community (golf, beach club, Journey School, JW Marriott), villas $1M-$5M+
- [Marbella](https://soldbytiago.com/marbella.html): emerging surf coast between Avellanas and Nosara, land at early-mover prices, uncrowded heavy waves
- [Nosara](https://soldbytiago.com/nosara.html): Playa Guiones surf, Blue Zone, Del Mar Academy, strict zoning, strongest appreciation ($500K+ entry)
